channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [STLNETWORK] STL Networks to Issue ₹108 Cr Convertible Warrants to Promoter
item.description:
STL Networks Ltd's Board of Directors approved the preferential issue of up to 4.5 crore convertible warrants to its promoter, Twin Star Overseas Limited. Each warrant is priced at ₹24, aggregating to a total issue size of ₹108 crore. Each warrant is convertible into one equity share of face value ₹2 at a premium of ₹22. The warrants can be exercised within 18 months from allotment. This move, which requires shareholder approval, will increase the promoter's stake from 42.91% to 47.73% on a fully diluted basis post-allotment. The Board also approved amendments to the company's Articles of Association to facilitate the issuance of such securities.

  • Board approved preferential issue of 4.5 crore convertible warrants.
  • Warrants priced at ₹24 each, totaling ₹108 crore.
  • Issued to promoter Twin Star Overseas Limited.
  • Each warrant convertible into one equity share.
  • Shareholder approval is required for the issuance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STL Networks Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [OML] Om Metallogic Reports Zero Pending Investor Complaints for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Om Metallogic Ltd submitted its statement of investor complaints for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 13(3) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company received one investor complaint during the quarter from January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2026, which originated from the SEBI SCORES platform. This single complaint was successfully disposed of within the same quarter. Consequently, Om Metallogic reported zero investor complaints remaining unresolved at the end of the quarter and financial year, certifying no pending complaints.

  • Om Metallogic filed investor complaint statement for Q4 FY26.
  • One investor complaint was received via SEBI SCORES.
  • The company resolved the single complaint during the quarter.
  • Zero investor complaints were pending at quarter-end.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Om Metallogic Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [SOLVEX] Solvex Edibles authorizes KMPs for materiality & disclosures
item.description:
Solvex Edibles Ltd has designated three Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs) as 'Authorised Persons' under Regulation 30(5) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Ashish Goel (Managing Director), Vishal Goel (Whole-time Director), and Rohit Gupta (Whole-time Director) are jointly and/or severally authorized to determine the materiality of events or information and make necessary disclosures to the Stock Exchanges. This move ensures compliance with regulatory requirements for timely and accurate corporate communication.

  • Company authorized KMPs for materiality and disclosures.
  • Ashish Goel, Vishal Goel, Rohit Gupta are the authorized persons.
  • Compliance with SEBI Regulation 30(5) is ensured.
  • Enhances transparency in corporate communication and governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Solvex Edibles Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [INDIANB] Indian Bank Discloses FY26 Non-Convertible Securities & Credit Ratings
item.description:
Indian Bank has submitted its annual disclosure for Non-Convertible Securities for the Financial Year 2025-26, as mandated by Chapter XIV of the SEBI Master Circular dated May 22, 2024. The filing provides comprehensive listing details for various ISINs, including new issues of Long Term Bonds (LTB) Series I, II, and III, and the relisting of an erstwhile Allahabad Bank bond. It also outlines the record date policy for coupon and principal payments. A significant portion of the disclosure details current and earlier credit ratings from CARE and CRISIL for various bonds, such as Tier 2 and AT 1 Perpetual Bonds, with most ratings reaffirmed at 'AAA Stable' or 'AA+ Stable'. The bank also noted the exercise of call options on specific Tier 2 and AT 1 bonds during FY2025-26.

  • Indian Bank filed annual disclosure for Non-Convertible Securities for FY2025-26.
  • Details include listing of new LTB Series I, II, III and an erstwhile Allahabad Bank bond.
  • Most bonds hold 'AAA Stable' or 'AA+ Stable' credit ratings from CARE and CRISIL.
  • The bank exercised call options on specific Tier 2 and AT 1 bonds.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN BANK | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [MGEL] Mangalam Global Appoints Auditors, Recommends ₹0.01 Dividend
item.description:
Mangalam Global Enterprise Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 18, 2026, approved the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also recommended a final dividend of ₹0.01 per equity share (1% of face value) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, M/s. Bhupendra J. Shah & Associates were appointed as Internal Auditor and M/s. V. M. Patel & Associates as Cost Auditor for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Board approved Q4 and FY26 standalone and consolidated audited financial results.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹0.01 per equity share for FY26, subject to AGM approval.
  • Appointed M/s. Bhupendra J. Shah & Associates as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Appointed M/s. V. M. Patel & Associates as Cost Auditor for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mangalam Global Enterprise Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [BANKBARODA] Bank of Baroda Appoints Mehrotra Manish Nath as Treasury Head
item.description:
Bank of Baroda has announced the appointment of Mr. Mehrotra Manish Nath as the Head (In-Charge) - Treasury & Global Markets, Special Treasury, Mumbai. The appointment order date is April 18, 2026. Mr. Mehrotra holds a Bachelor's degree in Commerce, a PG Diploma in Business Administration, and a Diploma in Investment & Treasury Management. He brings over 27 years of experience within the Bank, signifying a strategic change in its senior management personnel.

  • Mr. Mehrotra Manish Nath appointed as Head of Treasury & Global Markets.
  • He has over 27 years of experience within Bank of Baroda.
  • The appointment order date is April 18, 2026.
  • This is a significant change in the bank's senior management.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF BARODA | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SOLVEX] Solvex Edibles Appoints NBG & Co. as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Solvex Edibles Ltd. announced the appointment of M/s NBG & CO., Chartered Accountant (Firm Registration No. 025865N), as its Internal Auditor for the financial year 2025-26. The Board of Directors approved this appointment at its meeting held on April 18, 2026, following the recommendation of the Audit Committee. M/s NBG & Co. is a Chartered Accountancy firm established in November 2012, led by experienced Chartered Accountants including CA Yash Narang, CA Abhishek Bathla, and CA Mohit Gambhir. The firm offers a wide range of services, including statutory and internal audits, across various industries, aiming to support corporate governance.

  • Solvex Edibles appointed M/s NBG & Co. as its Internal Auditor.
  • The appointment is for the financial year 2025-26.
  • Board of Directors approved the appointment on April 18, 2026.
  • NBG & Co. is an established CA firm with extensive experience.
  • The appointment was based on the Audit Committee's recommendation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Solvex Edibles Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [ROSSARI] Rossari Biotech Board to meet on Apr 27 for Q4/FY26 results & dividend
item.description:
Rossari Biotech Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Monday, April 27, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Statements and Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will deliberate on and recommend the payment of a Final Dividend, if any, for the financial year concluded on March 31, 2026. The trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives remains closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the financial results are announced.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • To consider and recommend final dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rossari Biotech Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IIFLWAM] 360 ONE WAM Subsidiaries Transfer AIF & PMS Businesses
item.description:
360 ONE WAM LTD's wholly-owned subsidiaries, 360 ONE Portfolio Managers Limited and 360 ONE Asset Management Limited, have approved the transfer of their Alternative Investment Fund (AIF) and Portfolio Management Services (PMS) businesses. The AIF and PMS businesses will be transferred from 360 ONE Portfolio Managers Limited to 360 ONE Asset Management Limited on a going concern and slump sale basis. The consideration will not be less than the net book value of the undertaking. This strategic move aims to consolidate the asset management business for public equities, creating a unified investment platform and allowing for a sharper focus on this segment. The transfer is subject to shareholder and other necessary approvals. As an internal group transaction, it is not deemed prejudicial to investors or creditors, nor does it benefit promoters or alter shareholding.

  • Two wholly-owned subsidiaries approved transfer of AIF and PMS businesses.
  • AIF and PMS businesses to be transferred to consolidate asset management.
  • Transfer is on a slump sale basis for consideration not less than net book value.
  • Aims to create a unified investment platform for public equities.
  • Transaction requires shareholder and regulatory approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 360 One Wam Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [HDFCBANK] HDFC Bank: Mr. Bhavesh Zaveri retires as Executive Director
item.description:
HDFC Bank announced the retirement of Mr. Bhavesh Zaveri as an Executive Director, effective from the close of business hours on April 18, 2026. Mr. Zaveri joined the Bank in 1998 and held various critical positions, including Business Head – Wholesale Banking Operations, Group Head - Operations, and head of Information Technology. He was a key contributor to the Bank's growth, instrumental in developing its operations, digital footprint, and 'deep geography' strategy, which aided financial inclusion and the digital payment ecosystem, including participation in NPCI. The Board acknowledged his long and devoted service and significant contributions to the Bank and the broader banking industry.

  • Mr. Bhavesh Zaveri retired as Executive Director on April 18, 2026.
  • He served HDFC Bank for 28 years, joining in 1998.
  • Zaveri led operations, IT, and digital transformation initiatives.
  • He was crucial in building the bank's network and digital payment ecosystem.
  • The Board appreciated his long service and significant contributions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HDFC Bank Ltd | Category: Management Change
